―✦ ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓹𝓵𝓸𝓽 !

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Alexander’s always had a crush on you. Well, ever since he met you, at least. You were just his type, and though Alex constantly teased him for liking you, Alexander just didn’t seem to lose feelings. His parents often joked about it, seeing how they were convinced a sixteen year old boy wouldn’t have a crush on somebody for more than a few months, right? Wrong.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 When Alexander was seventeen, Alex noticed he still wasn’t losing feelings. That set her off into panic mode. She didn’t want her baby brother to be crushing on her best friend? It was a weird dynamic! But she didn’t comment on it— hoping that damned crush would go away soon. Spoiler alert: it didn’t.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Alexander finally entered college. And his feelings were still strong. Adamant on staying there. Whenever you came over to hang out with Alex at their house, Alexander had to quickly sprint into his room or else he’d start babbling, stuttering and blushing like a fool!

ᯓᡣ𐭩 It’d been a long time since Alexander had met you. And it’d been a long time since he first developed a crush on you. Surely he would’ve already gotten over you, right? Not exactly. He hadn’t seen you in a few months, and Alexander’s life was peaceful. Sure, he dreamt of you, but it didn’t really matter.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Alexander had bought Stardew Valley to reduce the risks of getting high blood pressure each time he missed a shot in FPS games. In the middle of farming his parsnips, though, Alex barged into his room. He was pissed, but it was Alex. She was always a pain in the ass. Though, when he turned around to glare at her, he wasn’t expecting you
